sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 모건스탠리는 2025년 4분기 매출 179억 달러, 연간 매출 706억 달러를 기록하며 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 매출 706억 달러와 주당순이익(EPS) 10.21달러를 기록하며 통합 기업 모델의 성과를 입증했습니다.
자산관리 및 투자관리 부문의 총 고객 자산이 9조 3,000억 달러로 성장했으며, 3,500억 달러 이상의 순신규자산을 유치했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 투자은행 활동 가속화와 글로벌 시장의 강세에 힘입어 기관 증권 사업 부문이 고객에게 핵심적인 자문 역할을 수행했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 순매출은 179억 달러로 전년 동기 162억 달러 대비 증가했습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a4q25msearningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Morgan Stanley Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Results Morgan Stanley Reports Fourth Quarter Net Revenues of $17.9 Billion, EPS of $2.68 and ROTCE of 21.8%; Full Year Net Revenues of $70.6 Billion, EPS of $10.21 and ROTCE of 21.6% NEW YORK, January 15, 2026 – Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today reported net revenues of $17.9 billion for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025 compared with $16.2 billion a year ago. Net income applicable to Morgan Stanley was $4.4 billion, or $2.68 per diluted share, compared with $3.7 billion, or $2.22 per diluted share, for the same pe  Normalized numeric aliases: $17.9 Billion = 179억 달러; $70.6 Billion = 706억 달러; $17.9 billion = 179억 달러; $16.2 billion = 162억 달러; $4.4 billion = 44억 달러; $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $70.6 billion = 706억 달러; $61.8 billion = 618억 달러; $13.4 billion = 134억 달러; $16.2 = 16.2달러; $16.9 = 16.9달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러; $2.22 = 2.22달러; $61.8 = 61.8달러; $13.4 = 13.4달러; $7.95 = 7.95달러.

Ted Pick, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, said , “Morgan Stanley delivered outstanding performance in 2025. The Firm produced full-year revenues of $70.6 billion, EPS of $10.21 and a ROTCE of 21.6%. Our performance reflects multi-year investments which have contributed to growth and momentum across the Integrated Firm. Total client assets in Wealth and Investment Management grew to $9.3 trillion, supported by over $350 billion in net new assets. Our Institutional Securities business served as a trusted advisor to clients as investment banking activity accelerated and global markets remained strong. The four pillars of the Integrated Firm – Strategy, Culture, Financial Strength and Growth – support our ability to drive long-term value   Normalized numeric aliases: $70.6 billion = 706억 달러; $9.3 trillion = 9조 3,000억 달러; $350 billion = 3,500억 달러; $70.6 = 70.6달러; $10.21 = 10.21달러; $9.3 = 9.3달러; $350 = 350달러; $70 = 70달러; 16,223 million = 162억 2,300만 달러; 17,890 million = 178억 9,000만 달러.
